feedback.summary: G-005 IMPLEMENT complete. First usage site migration (3 actual) delivered with legacy alias wrapper 5/5 functions + deprecation warnings + spec-compliant exports. D7 bundle gate measured (24.52 KB brotli ≤28.5 KB threshold) → single entry retained. tsconfig.app.json paths added (spec-implicit D2) for tw-framework-front tsc resolution. ADR-MOD-GRID-01-006 D8 multi-entry infrastructure in place for future 25KB+ trigger. MOD-GRID-01 wrapper module 5/5 complete.
feedback.migrationContext: First usage site migration from AS-IS BaseGrid/VirtualGrid/TreeGrid/ColumnPinGrid/GroupedHeaderGrid to new @tomis/grid-core/legacy aliases. 3 actual files (SlipListPage accounting list, AdminSlipEditPage admin detail, MenuManagePage tree navigation) successfully swapped import paths. No JSX modification — props mapping + narrowing (D5 expandAll→defaultExpanded boolean handling) fully backward-compatible.
feedback.d7Measurement: Bundle trajectory stable: G-001 17.44 KB → G-004 24.21 KB → G-005 24.52 KB (+0.31 KB). Alias-wrapper profile 94% compression efficiency (spec +5 KB → actual +0.31 KB). Decision: single entry main + /legacy sub-entry both active. MOD-GRID-02+ have 5.48 KB budget remaining (30 KB limit). Next trigger potential if cumulative >28.5 KB → main entry alias removal + /legacy mandatory.
